name: yhteentoimivuusalusta
description: MCP server for Finland's Yhteentoimivuusalusta (Interoperability Platform) - access standardized Finnish terminology, data models, and code lists for government and construction documentation.
author: yaskael

tools.name: search_terminology
tools.description: Search for Finnish government standardized terms and concepts from sanastot.suomi.fi

tools.name: get_concept_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a concept including terms, definitions, and relationships

tools.name: list_vocabularies
tools.description: List all available vocabularies from sanastot.suomi.fi

tools.name: search_datamodel
tools.description: Search for data models from tietomallit.suomi.fi

tools.name: get_datamodel_classes
tools.description: Get classes and properties from a specific data model

tools.name: get_model_vocabulary_links
tools.description: Find vocabulary concepts linked to a data model

tools.name: search_codelist
tools.description: Search for code lists from koodistot.suomi.fi

tools.name: get_codes
tools.description: Get codes from a specific code list

tools.name: validate_terminology
tools.description: Validate text against standardized Finnish vocabularies

tools.name: unified_search
tools.description: Search all three platforms (terminology, data models, code lists) simultaneously

tools.name: suggest_references
tools.description: Analyze text and suggest relevant standards to reference

tools.name: get_codelist_for_attribute
tools.description: Find code lists that can be used with data model attributes
